property.name: Attribute
property.value: Avenger. Gamma.

property.name: Text
property.value: Anger — Response: After Hulk takes damage, deal 1 damage to an enemy.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "You wouldn't like me when I'm angry."—Bruce Banner

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Genius. Scientist.

property.name: Text
property.value: Bring Out The Big Guy — Interrupt: When an enemy would scheme, spend a [physical] resource → change to your hero form. That enemy attacks you instead.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Please. Don't make me angry."

card.name: Black Widow

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Avenger. S.h.i.e.l.d. Spy.

card.property: [star] Response: After Black Widow thwarts, remove 1 threat from another scheme. Hero Action: Exhaust Black Widow → flip to your alter-ego form.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Hey big guy. Sun's getting real low."

card.name: Brilliant Mind

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using only [MENTAL] resources, choose to either remove 2 additional threat from that scheme or confuse an enemy.

card.property: "If my calculations are correct, this should work..." —Bruce Banner

card.name: Hulk Smash

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Attack. Superpower.

card.property: Hero Action: Make the following attacks against the same target: • (attack): Deal 3 damage. • (attack): Deal 3 damage. • (attack): Deal 3 damage.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Banner gone! Hulk SMASH!"

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt: When a treachery is revealed, take 2 damage → cancel all of its effects and discard it. If you overpaid for this card with a [energy] or [physical] resource, remove 2 threat from a scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Stupid humans hurt Hulk's friends!" --Hulk

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Attack. Superpower.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Deal 1 damage to Hulk → deal 3 damage to an enemy. If you paid for this card using a [physical] resource, this attack gains overkill.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Nothing stop Hulk!"—Hulk

property.name: Text
property.value: Spend this card only in alter-ego form.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "It's good to meet you, Dr. Banner. Your work on anti-electron collisions is unparalleled." -Tony Stark

card.name: Unnatural Strength

property.name: Text
property.value: Spend this card only in hero form.

card.property: "...And I'm a huge fan of the way you lose control and turn into an enormous green rage monster." —Tony Stark

card.name: The Other Guy

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Gamma. Persona.

card.property: Alter-Ego Response (thwart): After you change form, remove 1 threat from a scheme. (Limit once per phase.) Hero Response (attack): After you change form, deal 1 damage to an enemy. (Limit once per phase.)

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Skill. Superpower.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Response (thwart): After Hulk takes damage from an attack, exhaust Intimidating Roar → remove 1 threat from a scheme (2 threat instead if you took 3 or more damage).

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Leave Hulk ALONE!" —Hulk

card.name: Limitless Endurance

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Condition. Gamma. Superpower.

card.property: You get +3 hit points and Bruce Banner gets +1 REC. Hero Action: Exhaust Limitless Endurance → heal 1 damage from Hulk.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Our guns do nothing against it!"—Soldier

card.name: Limitless Strength

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Condition. Gamma. Superpower.

card.property: Hulk gets +1 ATK. Hero Resource: Exhaust Limitless Strength → generate a [physical] resource.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "The angrier I get, the stronger I get! I'm the strongest one there is!" —Hulk

card.name: Inner Conflict
card.property: Give to the Bruce Banner Player. Change form (flip your identity). Then: • If you are Bruce Banner, discard 1 random card from your hand. Discard this obligation. • If you are Hulk, exhaust your hero. Discard this obligation.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Give to the Bruce Banner player.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Elite. Gamma.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Forced Response: After Abomination attacks you, discard the top card of your deck. If a [physical] resource was discarded this way, take 2 damage.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Foolish rabble! Your pitiful display is nothing to my newfound power!"

property.name: Text
property.value: Threat cannot be removed from this scheme while Abomination is in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: When Revealed: The enemy with the highest ATK attacks the hero or ally with the highest ATK (first player decides ties.) If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "You are all beneath me!" —Abomination
